text: My exam is tomorrow and I feel like I don’t know anything
I want to master some skills but I’m confused about which ones and how to start
I want to become very knowledgeable but I don’t know what path to follow
I need a job but I don’t know where to begin
I want to start earning but I’m unsure which direction to take
I want financial independence but I don’t know what career path will get me there
I feel disowned right now, like nobody is with me
I feel overwhelmed thinking about everything at once
I want to build myself into my best version
I have ideas but I’m unable to implement them and feel useless
I was a bright student earlier but now I feel like a failure
I feel very lonely right now and blamed by friends
Everyone feels I’m irritating and I wonder if I’m bad
I want to connect with people but I push them away
